title: Green Wizard
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image= |name=Green Wizard
CT-19/39 |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |birth= |death=c. [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], [[Praesitlyn/Legends|Praesitlyn]]''[[Jedi Trial]]'' |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] {{C|[[Cloning/Legends|clone]]}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Special Operations Brigade/Legends|Special Operations Brigade]]''[[Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic]]'' states that all [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] were part of the [[Special Operations Brigade/Legends|Special Operations Brigade]]. |masters= |apprentices= }} '''Green Wizard''', known also as '''CT-19/39''', was a [[Clone Sergeant/Legends|clone trooper sergeant]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He was a [[Clone commando/Legends| Clone commando]] and died during the [[Battle of Praesitlyn]]. ==Biography== Around [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], CT-19/39 was among the 20,000 [[Clone trooper/Legends|Clone troopers]] led by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Nejaa Halcyon]] and [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] during the [[Battle of Praesitlyn]]. He was among the best scouts in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]] where he was able to penetrate deep into the enemy base and to memorize all the positions. He also recognized the weakness in their defense and went on his way back to pass on the knowledge. When all the other scouts in his team were eliminated by battle droids, CT-19/39 was the only one who could convey the important message. On his way back, he was caught between a barrage of two fronts and was badly shot in the leg. Nevertheless, he continued his way crawling, but he lost a large amount of blood and died in a dry river bed. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Jedi Trial]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=CT-19/39 |pl=CT-19/39 }} [[Category:Clone commandos]] [[Category:Clone trooper sergeants]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]]
